title: ProjectE+
description: Just some mods to play when youre bored of Create+
body:
# Play this modpack if youre bored of Create+
This modpack is here from the developers of Not awake studios. This modpack is almost the same modpack, as [Skyexchange](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/skyexchange) but has some changes. This modpack is a reupload from curseforge to modrinth.

# Mods and credit:
[Waystones](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waystones) (Creator's Twitter/X: @JoeCreates), [Baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles), [Better questing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-questing) and [Better questing - standard expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-questing-standard-expansion), [Chisel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chisel), [Ex Compressum](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ex-compressum), [Immersive Engineering](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-engineering), [ProjectE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte), [Totemic](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/totemic), [CFM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/food-addon-for-mrcrayfishs-furniture-mod), [Cyberware](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cyberware), [Ex Nihilo Omnia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ex-nihilo-omnia), [Extra utilities](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extra-utilities), [Roots](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roots).
# Where do you find help?
If you have any issues go onto our github page. If you want to ask any questions go to our discord server or e-mail devtech@jonkl.net
# Version
This is for minecraft version 1.10.2. Forge support only. You need the modrinth app to play. No plans to add curseforge support anytime soon.

### Made by [**Not Awake Studios**](https://modrinth.com/organization/NotAwakeStudios).
